q: 관계대명사의 역할은?
o: 1. 전치사 + 명사
2. 접속사 + 대명사

q: 관계대명사절의 역할은?
o: 1. 명사
2. 형용사

q: 관계대명사절의 수식을 받는 명사를?
o: 1. 선행사
2. 대명사

q: 선행사가 사람일때 주격 관계대명사는?
o: 1. who
2. whom

q: 선행사가 사람일때 목적격 관계대명사는?
o: 1. whom
2. whose

q: 선행사가 사람일때 소유격 관계대명사는?
o: 1. whom
2. whose

q: 선행사가 사물일때 주격 관계대명사는?
o: 1. who
2. which

q: 선행사가 사물일때 목적격 관계대명사는?
o: 1. who
2. which

q: 선행사에 관계없이 쓸수 있는 관계대명사는?
o: 1. who
2. that

q: 선행사를 포함한 관계대명사는?
o: 1. that
2. what

q: I like Mike. He is our math teacher.
o: 1. I like Mike who is our math teacher.
2. I like Mike whom is our math teacher.

q: I know a boy. He can speak English well.
o: 1. I know a boy who can speak English well.
2. I know a boy whom can speak English well.

q: I have a friend. He is a doctor.
o: 1. I have a friend who is a doctor.
2. I have a friend whom is a doctor.

q: This is the man. I saw him last night.
o: 1. This is the man who saw him last night.
1. This is the man whom I saw last night.

q: I met a girl. Her hair is blond.
o: 1. I met a girl who hair is blond.
2. I met a girl whose hair is blond.

q: I have a dog. It always follows me.
o: 1. I have a dog who always follows me.
2. I have a dog which always follows me.

q: This is the novel. Tom wrote it.
o: 1. This is the novel which he wrote.
2. This is the novel who wrote it.

q: This is the man. He said so.
o: 1. This is the man whom said so.
2. This is the man that said so.

q: The house is old. He lives in the house.
o: 1. The house who lives in is old.
2. The house that he lives in is old.

q: The house is old. He lives in the house.
o: 1. The house who lives in is old.
2. The house which he lives in is old.
